name: Tsuzuki Denki Co., Ltd.
summary: Tsuzuki Denki Co., Ltd. engages in the design, development, construction, and maintenance of network and information systems. It also sells electronic devices and information equipment. The company's electronic devices include logic ICs, memory ICs, discrete semiconductors, compound semiconductors, relays, connectors, keyboards, mouse, display panels, various circuit boards, communication modules, switches, volumes, sensors, magnetic devices, customized LSI design, development of microcomputer embedding software, and high frequency devices. Its information equipment include hard disks, PCs/servers, printers, other electronic devices, computer supplies, computer-related products, and stationary/office supplies, etc. The company serves manufacturing, distribution and services, medical and welfare, public and education, and financial fields. Tsuzuki Denki Co., Ltd. was founded in 1932 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
